explainability.path_to_improvement: Document how explanations are provided to users affected by AI decisions.

external_accountability.findings: Press releases mention a "responsible agentic AI" framework. These releases also reference certification by ISO standards, indicating adherence to external policies.
external_accountability.path_to_improvement: Publish third-party audit results, certifications, or regulatory compliance documentation.

relevant_sources.summary: This press release provides evidence for **external accountability**, **governance**, and **transparency**. It supports external accountability and governance by mentioning a "responsible agentic AI" framework and certification by ISO standards, indicating adherence to external policies. Transparency is supported by the announcement of "Conversational AI Agents" and descriptions of their capabilities and how they function.
relevant_sources.title: Concentrix Rolls Out Pre-Built Agentic AI for Instant Business Impact

fairness.path_to_improvement: Document bias testing procedures or vendor AI fairness requirements.

governance.findings: Blog posts discuss AI applications, agentic AI, and the need for an AI-driven operating framework. Press releases mention a "responsible agentic AI" framework and reference certification by ISO standards. Additionally, press releases mention various AI applications and concepts like "AI Maturity Assessment," while privacy policy documents imply governance considerations related to AI technology integration and deployment.
governance.path_to_improvement: Name an AI governance body with defined mandate covering all AI use.

relevant_sources.summary: This company-owned blog post, "AI Governance in Customer Experience: First Steps & Best Practices," provides evidence for the **governance** and **transparency** pillars of responsible AI. The post supports the **governance** pillar by discussing AI applications, agentic AI, and the need for an AI-driven operating framework. It supports the **transparency** pillar by mentioning AI applications and the concept of an Agentic AI Maturity Assessment, suggesting a focus on understanding and communicating AI's role.
relevant_sources.title: AI Governance in Customer Experience: First Steps & Best Practices

relevant_sources.summary: This press release, "Concentrix High-Trust Standard for Secure AI," provides evidence for the **governance** and **transparency** pillars of responsible AI. The document supports these pillars by mentioning various AI applications and concepts such as "agentic AI app," "AI-powered workspace," "AI Applications," "Generative AI," and "AI Maturity Assessment," which indicate a structured approach to AI development and deployment.
relevant_sources.title: Concentrix High-Trust Standard for Secure AI

relevant_sources.summary: This privacy policy document, "Binding corporate rules as controller," provides evidence for the **governance** and **transparency** pillars of responsible AI. It supports transparency by outlining that data subjects must be informed about the existence of automated decision-making, including profiling, when their personal data is collected. The document also implies governance considerations by mentioning the integration and deployment of AI technologies.
relevant_sources.title: Binding corporate rules as controller

oversight.path_to_improvement: Document human review processes for AI-assisted decisions (built or vendor AI).

privacy.path_to_improvement: Document data protection practices for AI systems, including vendor AI data handling.

transparency.findings: Published materials mention various AI applications, including "agentic AI app," "AI-powered workspace," "Generative AI," and "Conversational AI Agents," with descriptions of their capabilities and functions. These materials also reference the concept of an Agentic AI Maturity Assessment or AI Maturity Assessment. Furthermore, privacy policy documents outline that data subjects must be informed about automated decision-making and profiling when their personal data is collected.
transparency.path_to_improvement: Publish detailed documentation (model cards, system specs) for AI systems deployed.

summary.overall_findings: Based on 17 publicly available sources, Concentrix's published materials address 3 of 7 evaluated responsible AI pillars. Transparency, governance, and external accountability are each addressed at the policy level. Transparency disclosures mention AI applications and reference the concept of an Agentic AI Maturity Assessment, while blog posts discuss AI applications and the need for an AI-driven operating framework within governance. Press releases further mention a "responsible agentic AI" framework and reference certification by ISO standards for external accountability. No qualifying public evidence was found for fairness, explainability, and 2 additional pillars.
